content.full_text:
54200

October 14, 1976

96-10-145

Bobby Cheatwood
Post Office Box 752
Gonzales, California 93926

Dear Mr. Cheatwood:

In response to your letter of October 7, no report is due from
your committee until the next regularly scheduled filing dead-
line which will be October 21, with a closing date of October 18.

Your final report will cover the period from October 19 through
December 30 and is due on January 6, 1977. The final report
may be filed early if all expenses are paid and the receipt of
additional contributions is not anticipated.

Please let me know if I may be of additional assistance.

Very truly yours,


Regina Siciliano-Kutchins
Technical Assistance Program
Coordinator


RSK:bw

bcc: Jeanne P.

October 7, 1976


Fair Political Practices Commission
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA  95804

Dear Sirs:

I am the treasurer of the Committee to Re-elect Judge Hedegard.
On September 23, our receipts went over $500 for this year, and
we filed our form to register with the Secretary of State on
that same date.

Should we file a financial report now or wait until the next
regular deadline of October 18?

Sincerely yours,

Bobby Cheatwood

The Committee to Re-elect Judge Hedegard
Box 752
Gonzales, CA  93926

sections.question: Should we file a financial report now or wait until the next regular deadline of October 18?
sections.conclusion: In response to your letter of October 7, no report is due from your committee until the next regularly scheduled filing deadline which will be October 21, with a closing date of October 18. Your final report will cover the period from October 19 through December 30 and is due on January 6, 1977. The final report may be filed early if all expenses are paid and the receipt of additional contributions is not anticipated.
sections.question_synthetic: A committee treasurer asks whether a financial report must be filed immediately after the committee's receipts exceed $500, or whether they should wait until the next regular filing deadline.
sections.conclusion_synthetic: No report is due until the next regularly scheduled filing deadline of October 21 (with closing date October 18). The final report covering October 19 through December 30 is due January 6, 1977, and may be filed early if conditions are met.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Document contains both incoming request (October 7 letter from Bobby Cheatwood) and FPPC response letter (October 14 from Regina Siciliano-Kutchins). Classified as advice_letter since the document is indexed/provided as the FPPC's response. Both question and conclusion sections are clearly identifiable from the respective letters.

QUESTION: Should we file a financial report now or wait until the next regular deadline of October 18?

CONCLUSION: In response to your letter of October 7, no report is due from your committee until the next regularly scheduled filing deadline which will be October 21, with a closing date of October 18. Your final report will cover the period from October 19 through December 30 and is due on January 6, 1977. The final report may be filed early if all expenses are paid and the receipt of additional contributions is not anticipated.

embedding.summary: FPPC responds to a committee treasurer's inquiry about reporting requirements after the committee's receipts exceed $500, clarifying that no report is due until the next regular filing deadline with specific dates provided for the final report.
